prompt: Verify the Muster Obsidian capability pack baseline contract.
recordedResponseText:
obsidian capability pack baseline.
Implemented tools: obsidian_vault_status, obsidian_notes_list, obsidian_note_read, obsidian_notes_search, obsidian_note_create, obsidian_note_append.
Status: v0: local vault read/write tools with path traversal protection. Delete, rename, attachment indexing, and non-markdown binary handling are intentionally excluded..
Safety: secret redaction is required and no raw credentials should be printed.
